mapper.select: SELECT * FROM performance_records WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

select.if:
SELECT * FROM performance_records WHERE is_valid = TRUE AND order_id IN
#{id}

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO performance_records ( id, order_id, order_row_id, default_channel_user_id, default_recruiter_user_id, final_channel_user_id, final_recruiter_user_id, channel_attribution, recruiter_attribution, talent_id, partner_id, product_id, activity_id, pay_amount, settle_amount, estimate_service_fee, effective_service_fee, estimate_tech_service_fee, effective_tech_service_fee, estimate_service_fee_expense, effective_service_fee_expense, estimate_service_profit, effective_service_profit, estimate_recruiter_commission, effective_recruiter_commission, estimate_channel_commission, effective_channel_commission, estimate_gross_profit, effective_gross_profit, recruiter_commission_rate, channel_commission_rate, order_status, settle_time, order_create_time, is_valid, is_reversed, calculation_version, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{orderRowId}, #{defaultChannelUserId}, #{defaultRecruiterUserId}, #{finalChannelUserId}, #{finalRecruiterUserId}, #{channelAttribution}, #{recruiterAttribution}, #{talentId}, #{partnerId}, #{productId}, #{activityId}, #{payAmount}, #{settleAmount}, #{estimateServiceFee}, #{effectiveServiceFee}, #{estimateTechServiceFee}, #{effectiveTechServiceFee}, #{estimateServiceFeeExpense}, #{effectiveServiceFeeExpense}, #{estimateServiceProfit}, #{effectiveServiceProfit}, #{estimateRecruiterCommission}, #{effectiveRecruiterCommission}, #{estimateChannelCommission}, #{effectiveChannelCommission}, #{estimateGrossProfit}, #{effectiveGrossProfit}, #{recruiterCommissionRate}, #{channelCommissionRate}, #{orderStatus}, #{settleTime}, #{orderCreateTime}, #{valid}, #{reversed}, #{calculationVersion}, #{calculatedAt}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO UPDATE SET order_row_id = EXCLUDED.order_row_id, default_channel_user_id = EXCLUDED.default_channel_user_id, default_recruiter_user_id = EXCLUDED.default_recruiter_user_id, final_channel_user_id = EXCLUDED.final_channel_user_id, final_recruiter_user_id = EXCLUDED.final_recruiter_user_id, channel_attribution = EXCLUDED.channel_attribution, recruiter_attribution = EXCLUDED.recruiter_attribution, talent_id = EXCLUDED.talent_id, partner_id = EXCLUDED.partner_id, product_id = EXCLUDED.product_id, activity_id = EXCLUDED.activity_id, pay_amount = EXCLUDED.pay_amount, settle_amount = EXCLUDED.settle_amount, estimate_service_fee = EXCLUDED.estimate_service_fee, effective_service_fee = EXCLUDED.effective_service_fee, estimate_tech_service_fee = EXCLUDED.estimate_tech_service_fee, effective_tech_service_fee = EXCLUDED.effective_tech_service_fee, estimate_service_fee_expense = EXCLUDED.estimate_service_fee_expense, effective_service_fee_expense = EXCLUDED.effective_service_fee_expense, estimate_service_profit = EXCLUDED.estimate_service_profit, effective_service_profit = EXCLUDED.effective_service_profit, estimate_recruiter_commission = EXCLUDED.estimate_recruiter_commission, effective_recruiter_commission = EXCLUDED.effective_recruiter_commission, estimate_channel_commission = EXCLUDED.estimate_channel_commission, effective_channel_commission = EXCLUDED.effective_channel_commission, estimate_gross_profit = EXCLUDED.estimate_gross_profit, effective_gross_profit = EXCLUDED.effective_gross_profit, recruiter_commission_rate = EXCLUDED.recruiter_commission_rate, channel_commission_rate = EXCLUDED.channel_commission_rate, order_status = EXCLUDED.order_status, settle_time = EXCLUDED.settle_time, order_create_time = EXCLUDED.order_create_time, is_valid = EXCLUDED.is_valid, is_reversed = EXCLUDED.is_reversed, calculation_version = performance_records.calculation_version + 1, calculated_at = EXCLUDED.calculated_at, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
